name: io.github.SurfEther/trustsource
description: x402-paid domain verification for AI agents — trustscore, SSL, security headers, robots.

environmentVariables.name: WALLET_PRIVATE_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Base Mainnet wallet private key holding USDC (fees) and ETH (gas).

environmentVariables.name: TRUSTSOURCE_API_URL
environmentVariables.description: Override the TrustSource API base URL. Optional.
